chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.Ps No.S-26 of 2021 along with C.P No.S-88/2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MIT-II report dated 03.03.2021. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 04.03.2021 Mr. Asif Ali Mastoi, Advocate along with Petitioners. Mr. K.B Lutuf Ali Leghari, Advocate for the Respondents. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, Assistant A.G, Sindh along with SI Din Muhammad of P.S Site Hyderabad. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Assistant P.G, Sindh. -x-x-x-x-x- Pursuant to directions issued under earlier order, official respondents have filed their respective compliance reports which being self-explanatory are hereby taken on record. At the request of learned counsel for the respondents, petitioner No.1 was allowed to have an audience with her parents in Court room and after about one and half hour she has been examined. In her statement petitioner No.1 though is unable to speak in Urdu or Sindhi; yet understands the queries in Urdu and replies that she would prefer to go with her husband instead of her parents. Confronting with above statement of the petitioner No.1 counsel for the respondents No.7 and 8 shows his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition. Since petitioner No.1 seems to be adult, has entered into Nikkah with petitioner No.2 according to her freewill and to such effect she has also annexed copies of affidavit of her freewill and Nikahnama, therefore, purpose of the petition, in view of statement of petitioner No.1, seems to have achieved. Consequently, same is hereby disposed of along with pending application(s).

Since petitioner No.1 seems to be adult, has entered into Nikkah with petitioner No.2 according to her freewill and to such effect she has also annexed copies of affidavit of her freewill and Nikahnama, therefore, purpose of the petition, in view of statement of petitioner No.1, seems to have achieved. Consequently, same is hereby disposed of along with pending application(s). Counsel for the petitioners submits that petitioners apprehend imminent danger at the hands of outlaws outside the Court, therefore, seeks legal protection along with squads. ‘ Page 2 of 2 Learned Assistant A.G, Sindh present, is directed to provide legal protection to the couple with directions to the concerned police to shift the couple from the Court premises towards their destination. Per report furnished by the police, address shown by the petitioners in their petition is not the same even they are not residing at the given place/address. Under these circumstance, it will be appropriate for precious life of the petitioner No.1, petitioner No.2 shall execute security bond in the sum of rupees two million. Unless petitioner No.1 may execute required security bond before Nazir of this Court, his CNIC bearing No.42201-7704416-3 shall remain blocked. Copy of this order be communicated to NADRA for compliance. Petitions in hand stand disposed of. Office to place copy of this order in connected petition. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
